name: Create GitHub monorepo (KAL Solutions)
description: As CTO, I need to set up the GitHub repository under KAL Solutions org with a monorepo structure: /mobile (React Native), /functions (Cloud Functions), /admin (web admin panel), /shared (types/utils). Code stays in KAL repo; pushed to client remote after each paid milestone.
acceptance_criteria:
- GitHub repo created under KAL Solutions org with branch protection on main
- Monorepo structure with mobile/, functions/, admin/, shared/ directories
- .gitignore configured for RN, Node, and environment files
- README with project overview and setup instructions
- Client remote configured (push after milestone payment)
tests_validation:
- Clone repo, verify structure
- Verify branch protection rules
- Verify .gitignore excludes node_modules, .env, build artifacts

name: Configure CI/CD pipelines
description: Set up CI/CD for automated builds. EAS Build for React Native (iOS + Android), GitHub Actions for Cloud Functions deployment, and linting/testing on PR.
acceptance_criteria:
- GitHub Actions workflow for Cloud Functions (lint + deploy to dev)
- EAS Build configuration for iOS and Android
- PR checks: lint + type check
- Deploy scripts for staging and production
tests_validation:
- Push to develop branch triggers CI
- EAS build runs successfully for both platforms
- Functions deploy to dev Firebase project

name: Set up environment separation
description: Create dev/staging/production environment configurations. Environment variables for Firebase config, API keys, and feature flags.
acceptance_criteria:
- .env.dev, .env.staging, .env.production files templated
- Firebase project aliases configured (dev, production)
- EAS build profiles for dev/preview/production
- Secrets stored securely (not in repo)
tests_validation:
- Build app with dev config, verify connects to dev Firebase
- Build with production config, verify different project

name: Import tasks into KAL CRM
description: Import MOOVIZ-TASKS.csv into KAL CRM project. Verify milestones and task dependencies are correctly mapped.
acceptance_criteria:
- KAL CRM project created for MOOVIZ
- All tasks imported from CSV
- Milestones M0-M4 set up
- Task dependencies configured
tests_validation:
- Verify all tasks visible in KAL CRM
- Verify milestone grouping correct

name: Create Firebase projects (dev + production)
description: Set up two Firebase projects: mooviz-dev and mooviz-prod. Enable Auth, Firestore, Functions, Storage, FCM. Configure billing alerts.
acceptance_criteria:
- Two Firebase projects created and configured
- All required services enabled
- Billing alerts set at $50/$100/$200
- Firebase CLI configured with project aliases
tests_validation:
- firebase use dev — connects to dev project
- firebase use prod — connects to prod project
- All services visible in Firebase console

name: Configure Firebase Authentication
description: Enable phone (SMS) and email OTP providers. Configure SMS templates. Set up authorized domains. Test with Firebase Auth emulator.
acceptance_criteria:
- Phone auth provider enabled
- Email link auth enabled
- SMS template configured (Hebrew + English)
- Auth emulator working locally
tests_validation:
- Send OTP to test phone number
- Verify OTP succeeds
- Test with emulator locally

name: Set up Firestore and Security Rules baseline
description: Initialize Firestore in both projects. Deploy baseline security rules that deny all by default. Enable emulator for local development.
acceptance_criteria:
- Firestore initialized in both projects
- Default deny-all security rules deployed
- Firestore emulator configured
- Composite indexes placeholder
tests_validation:
- Attempt read without auth — denied
- Emulator starts and accepts writes
- Rules deploy without errors

name: Set up Cloud Storage and FCM
description: Configure Cloud Storage buckets for images (proof photos, profile pics, item photos). Enable FCM for push notifications.
acceptance_criteria:
- Storage bucket created with folder structure
- Storage security rules (authenticated uploads only)
- FCM enabled, APNs key uploaded for iOS
- Android FCM config added
tests_validation:
- Upload test file via Firebase console
- Verify storage rules block unauthenticated access
- FCM test message sends successfully

name: Initialize React Native project
description: Create React Native project (Expo managed or bare). Configure TypeScript, ESLint, Prettier. Set up path aliases and project structure.
acceptance_criteria:
- RN project runs on iOS simulator and Android emulator
- TypeScript configured with strict mode
- ESLint + Prettier configured
- Folder structure: screens/, components/, services/, hooks/, utils/, types/
tests_validation:
- npx expo start / react-native run-ios works
- No TypeScript errors
- Lint passes

name: Set up navigation structure
description: Configure React Navigation with tab navigator (bottom tabs for Sender and Driver) and stack navigators for each flow. Support RTL.
acceptance_criteria:
- Bottom tab navigator with role-based tabs
- Stack navigators for: Auth, Home, Deliveries, Feed, Chat, Profile, Settings
- RTL layout support verified
- Deep linking scaffold
tests_validation:
- Navigate through all major screens (placeholder)
- RTL mode shows correct layout direction
- Tab bar switches based on user role

name: Build base component library
description: Create reusable UI components: Button, TextInput, Card, Modal, Avatar, Badge, Rating Stars, Status Badge, LoadingIndicator, EmptyState, ErrorState.
acceptance_criteria:
- All base components created with props
- Theme system (colors, typography, spacing)
- RTL-aware components
- Storybook or test screen showing all components
tests_validation:
- Render each component in test screen
- Verify RTL layout
- Theme colors apply correctly

name: Integrate Google Maps SDK
description: Add Google Maps to React Native project. Get API keys, configure for iOS and Android. Create base MapView component.
acceptance_criteria:
- Google Maps SDK integrated
- API key configured for both platforms
- Base MapView component renders
- Marker and region components ready
tests_validation:
- Map renders on iOS and Android
- Markers display at coordinates
- Map responds to gestures

name: Implement OTP login flow (SMS)
description: Core authentication: user enters phone number, receives SMS OTP, enters code, gets authenticated. This is the gate to everything — no auth means no app.
acceptance_criteria:
- Phone input screen with country code selector
- OTP verification screen (6-digit code)
- Firebase Auth phone sign-in working
- Loading states during OTP send/verify
- Error handling: invalid number, wrong code, expired code, rate limit
tests_validation:
- Enter valid phone → receive SMS → enter code → authenticated
- Enter wrong code → error message shown
- Resend OTP after timeout works
- Invalid phone number shows validation error

name: Implement OTP login flow (Email)
description: Alternative auth path: email link authentication. User enters email, receives magic link or code, gets authenticated.
acceptance_criteria:
- Email input screen
- Email link / OTP verification
- Firebase Auth email sign-in working
- Fallback when SMS not available
tests_validation:
- Enter email → receive link/code → verify → authenticated
- Invalid email shows error
- Email resend works

name: Implement auth state persistence
description: Persist authentication state so users don't need to re-login. Handle token refresh, session expiry, and logout.
acceptance_criteria:
- Auth state persisted across app restarts
- Token auto-refresh working
- Logout clears session
- Deep link to login if session expired
tests_validation:
- Close app, reopen → still logged in
- Logout → returns to login screen
- After 1 hour → still authenticated (token refreshed)

name: Build registration form screen
description: One-time registration for new users. All required fields from spec. Multi-step form for better UX. Validation on each step.
acceptance_criteria:
- Multi-step registration form
- All fields: name, phone, email, city, role, profile photo, ID/license photo
- Field validations per spec (name 2-60 chars, phone format, etc.)
- Terms + privacy consent checkbox (required)
- Progress indicator
tests_validation:
- Fill all fields correctly → proceeds to next step
- Skip required field → validation error shown
- Phone format validation works for Israeli + international
- Terms unchecked → cannot proceed

name: Implement profile photo upload
description: Profile photo upload from camera or gallery. Resize/compress before upload. Default avatar if none provided.
acceptance_criteria:
- Camera capture option
- Gallery selection option
- Image resize/compress before upload
- Upload to Cloud Storage
- Default avatar for no-photo users
tests_validation:
- Take photo → preview → upload → shown in profile
- Select from gallery → same flow
- Skip photo → default avatar shown
- Large image compressed before upload

name: Implement KYC-Light (ID/license upload)
description: Upload ID card or driver license photo for admin verification. Camera or gallery import. Stored securely.
acceptance_criteria:
- Photo capture/import for ID document
- Stored in Cloud Storage with user reference
- KYC status field on user profile: pending/approved/rejected
- Admin can view uploaded document
tests_validation:
- Upload ID photo → stored with correct user reference
- User profile shows KYC status
- Admin panel shows uploaded document

name: Build profile view and edit screens
description: User profile screen showing all details, rating, completed count. Edit capability for modifiable fields.
acceptance_criteria:
- Profile screen with all user data
- Average rating display (stars)
- Completed deliveries/trips count
- Join date
- Edit screen for modifiable fields (name, city, photo)
tests_validation:
- Profile shows correct data
- Edit name → saved → profile updated
- Rating displays correctly
- Completed count matches actual deliveries

name: Design and implement Firestore data models
description: Define all Firestore collections and document schemas. This is the data backbone — users, deliveries, chats, ratings, reports, admin actions. Includes TypeScript interfaces.
acceptance_criteria:
- Users collection with all fields
- Deliveries collection with all listing fields + status + participants
- Chats collection with messages subcollection
- Ratings collection
- Reports collection
- Admin actions collection
- TypeScript interfaces for all models
- Firestore indexes for common queries
tests_validation:
- Create user document → all fields stored correctly
- Create delivery → all listing fields + metadata stored
- Query deliveries by status + location → returns results
- TypeScript types match Firestore structure

name: Set up Firestore composite indexes
description: Create composite indexes for queries: deliveries by status+geohash, user deliveries by userId+status, chats by deliveryId+timestamp, etc.
acceptance_criteria:
- All required composite indexes deployed
- Query performance acceptable
- No index errors in logs
tests_validation:
- Run all planned queries → no missing index warnings
- Feed query returns sorted results efficiently
- Chat messages ordered by timestamp

name: Implement Firestore security rules
description: Write security rules for all collections. Users can read/write own data, drivers see available deliveries, admins have elevated access.
acceptance_criteria:
- Users: read own, write own, admin read all
- Deliveries: read by participants + drivers (if active), write by owner/participants
- Chats: read/write by delivery participants only
- Ratings: create by participants, read by all
- Admin overrides for admin role
tests_validation:
- Authenticated user reads own profile → success
- User reads another user's profile → limited fields only
- Driver reads active delivery feed → success
- Non-participant reads chat → denied
- Admin reads any document → success

name: Build Cloud Functions scaffold
description: Set up Cloud Functions project with TypeScript. Create function structure: auth triggers, Firestore triggers, HTTP endpoints. Deploy pipeline.
acceptance_criteria:
- Cloud Functions project with TypeScript
- Function groups: auth/, delivery/, chat/, notification/, admin/
- Shared utils: validation, notifications, timestamps
- Local emulator working
- Deploy to dev project
tests_validation:
- Deploy functions → no errors
- Emulator runs all functions locally
- TypeScript compiles cleanly

name: Implement RBAC utility functions
description: Create role-based access control utilities for Cloud Functions. Validate user roles (sender/driver/admin) in function calls.
acceptance_criteria:
- getRoleFromToken() utility
- requireRole() middleware for HTTP functions
- isAdmin() check
- Role validation in Firestore triggers
tests_validation:
- Function called by sender with driver-only access → rejected
- Admin function called by non-admin → rejected
- Correct role → function executes

name: Build auth flow screens (complete)
description: Polish the auth flow: splash screen, welcome/onboarding slides, phone/email selection, OTP entry, registration routing.
acceptance_criteria:
- Splash screen with logo
- Welcome screen with 2-3 onboarding slides
- Auth method selection (phone/email)
- OTP entry with auto-fill support
- Route to registration if new user, home if returning
tests_validation:
- Cold start → splash → welcome (first time) → auth → home
- Returning user → splash → home (auto-login)
- New user → splash → welcome → auth → registration → home

name: Implement global state management
description: Set up state management for auth state, user profile, active deliveries, and notifications. React Context or Zustand.
acceptance_criteria:
- Auth context with user state
- User profile context
- Active deliveries state
- Notification badge count
- Persistent storage for offline cache
tests_validation:
- Login → user state populated
- Profile update → state reflects immediately
- Delivery status change → state updates via listener

name: Build Firebase service layer
description: Create service abstraction layer for all Firebase operations: auth, Firestore CRUD, Storage upload, FCM token management.
acceptance_criteria:
- AuthService: login, logout, getUser, onAuthChange
- FirestoreService: CRUD with type safety
- StorageService: upload, getURL, delete
- FCMService: getToken, onMessage, onNotificationOpen
tests_validation:
- Call AuthService.login() → Firebase auth triggered
- Call FirestoreService.getDeliveries() → typed results
- Call StorageService.upload() → file uploaded, URL returned

name: Implement error boundary and crash handling
description: Global error boundary for React Native. Graceful error screens. Crash reporting setup.
acceptance_criteria:
- Error boundary component wrapping app
- Fallback error screen with retry
- Unhandled promise rejection handling
- Console error logging (dev) / crash reporting (prod)
tests_validation:
- Throw error in component → error screen shown, not crash
- Press retry → app recovers
- Unhandled rejection → caught and logged

name: Build home screen (role-based)
description: Home screen that adapts to user role. Sender sees create delivery CTA, driver sees find deliveries CTA. Greeting with name, social links.
acceptance_criteria:
- Role-based layout (sender vs driver)
- Greeting: 'Hi {name}, glad to see you again'
- Tagline: 'Connecting people on your way'
- Primary CTA: 'Create new delivery' (sender) / 'Find nearby deliveries' (driver)
- Social links: Facebook, Instagram, TikTok
tests_validation:
- Login as sender → home shows 'Create new delivery'
- Login as driver → home shows 'Find nearby deliveries'
- Name appears in greeting
- Social links open correct URLs

name: Build onboarding flow (first-time users)
description: First-time user onboarding with 2-3 slides explaining the app. Show only once per user.
acceptance_criteria:
- 2-3 onboarding slides with illustrations
- Skip button
- Dot navigation
- Shown only on first launch (persisted flag)
tests_validation:
- First launch → onboarding shown
- Complete or skip → home screen
- Subsequent launches → straight to home

name: Build create listing form
description: Full listing creation form for senders. Address autocomplete via Google Places, photo upload, all required fields. Multi-step for better UX.
acceptance_criteria:
- All listing fields from spec implemented
- Google Places autocomplete for addresses
- Item photo upload (camera/gallery)
- Date picker: ASAP or future date+time
- Item type dropdown
- Size selector (small/medium/large)
- Price input with ₪ symbol
- Notes field (optional)
- Field validation per spec
tests_validation:
- Fill all required fields → publish button enabled
- Missing required field → validation error
- Address autocomplete suggests real addresses
- Photo uploads and shows preview
- Price must be ≥ 1

name: Implement listing backend (create/edit/delete)
description: Cloud Functions and Firestore operations for listing CRUD. Server-side validation. Status initialization.
acceptance_criteria:
- createDelivery Cloud Function with validation
- editDelivery (only if status=New and no driver)
- deleteDelivery (only if status=New)
- Initial status set to 'New Delivery'
- Geohash generated from pickup coordinates
tests_validation:
- Create listing → document in Firestore with correct fields
- Edit listing before driver → success
- Edit listing after driver assigned → rejected
- Delete listing → document removed or status set

name: Build My Deliveries screen (Sender)
description: List of sender's deliveries with status, drill-down to details. Cancel, chat, navigate actions.
acceptance_criteria:
- List view with item photo, addresses, status badge
- Drill into delivery: full details, action buttons
- Cancel button (pre-pickup only)
- Chat/phone buttons
- Navigation button (status-dependent)
- Report driver button
tests_validation:
- Sender sees own deliveries with correct statuses
- Tap delivery → shows full details
- Cancel pre-pickup delivery → status changes
- Cancel post-pickup → button disabled/hidden

name: Build driver feed screen
description: Feed of available deliveries for drivers. Shows item photo, pickup address, destination, price. Filter controls.
acceptance_criteria:
- Scrollable feed of available listings
- Each card: item photo, pickup, destination, price
- Filter bar: size, city, distance radius
- Pull-to-refresh
- Empty state: 'No deliveries found in your area'
tests_validation:
- Open feed → shows available listings
- Apply filter → feed updates
- No listings → empty state shown
- Pull down → refreshes feed

name: Implement geohash-based radius search
description: Backend logic for proximity search. Store driver location with geohash. Query deliveries within configurable radius.
acceptance_criteria:
- Geohash library integrated
- Delivery documents include geohash field
- Query function: getDeliveriesInRadius(lat, lng, radiusKm)
- Haversine exact distance filter
- Configurable radius: 1km/3km/5km
tests_validation:
- Query with 3km radius near delivery → found
- Query with 1km radius far from delivery → not found
- Results sorted by distance
- Performance: query returns in < 1 second

name: Implement 'I am Interested' action
description: Driver clicks 'I'm Interested' — sets delivery to 'Pending Sender Approval', removes from feed, notifies sender.
acceptance_criteria:
- Button triggers status change via Cloud Function
- Delivery removed from general feed
- Visible only to sender + selected driver
- Push notification sent to sender
- Concurrency check: only one driver per delivery
tests_validation:
- Click 'Interested' → status changes to 'Pending Sender Approval'
- Delivery disappears from other drivers' feeds
- Sender receives push notification
- Second driver tries → rejected (already has interested driver)

name: Implement delivery status state machine (Cloud Function)
description: The most critical backend component. Cloud Function that validates and executes status transitions. All rules from the contract enforced server-side.
acceptance_criteria:
- Transition validation function
- All 7 statuses with allowed transitions
- Actor validation (who can trigger which transition)
- Cancellation rules (blocked after Picked Up)
- Concurrency locking (one driver per delivery)
- Timeout logic (72h auto-revert)
- Each transition triggers: status update, timestamp, actor log
- Returns error for invalid transitions
tests_validation:
- New → Pending (driver) → success
- New → Picked Up → rejected (invalid transition)
- Picked Up → Cancelled → rejected (blocked)
- Pending for 72h → auto-reverts to New
- Two drivers try to accept → only first succeeds
- Status change records timestamp + actor

name: Build delivery detail screen with status actions
description: Delivery detail screen showing all info and status-dependent action buttons. Different view for sender vs driver.
acceptance_criteria:
- Full delivery info display
- Status badge with current state
- Action buttons change by status and role
- Sender: approve driver, cancel, view map, chat
- Driver: picked up, delivered, cancel, navigate, chat
- Timeline of status changes visible
tests_validation:
- Sender sees 'Approve' button when pending
- Driver sees 'Picked Up' button when waiting
- After pickup, cancel button hidden
- Timeline shows all status changes with timestamps

name: Implement driver location broadcasting
description: Driver app broadcasts location at throttled intervals when on active delivery. Stored in Firestore with geohash.
acceptance_criteria:
- Location updates at configurable interval (e.g., 10-30 seconds)
- Stored: lat, lng, geohash, heading, speed, updatedAt
- Throttled to prevent excessive writes
- Battery optimization (significant change filter)
- Stop broadcasting when delivery completed
tests_validation:
- Start delivery → location updates appear in Firestore
- Updates every ~15 seconds during active delivery
- Delivery completed → updates stop
- Battery usage reasonable

name: Build live map tracking view
description: Map screen showing both sender and driver positions. Route visualization. Status-based display states.
acceptance_criteria:
- Google Maps with both party markers
- Driver position updates in real-time
- Route line between pickup/destination
- Status-based markers (pickup point, destination, current)
- 'Location unavailable' fallback
- Map auto-centers on relevant area
tests_validation:
- Open tracking → see both markers on map
- Driver moves → marker updates in real-time
- GPS disabled → 'Location unavailable' message
- Route line shows between points

name: Implement navigation deep links
description: Launch Google Maps / Waze / Apple Maps with destination coordinates from delivery details.
acceptance_criteria:
- Navigation button in delivery details
- Option to choose: Google Maps, Waze, Apple Maps
- Deep link opens native app with destination
- Status-dependent: pickup address or destination address
tests_validation:
- Tap navigate → opens Google Maps/Waze with correct destination
- During 'Waiting for Pickup' → navigates to pickup address
- During 'Picked Up' → navigates to destination

name: Build real-time chat screen
description: 1:1 chat between sender and driver per delivery. Real-time messaging with Firestore listeners. Delivery info header.
acceptance_criteria:
- Chat screen with message bubbles
- Real-time message sync (Firestore onSnapshot)
- Delivery thumbnail + status in header
- Phone call shortcut button
- Keyboard handling and scroll behavior
- Message timestamps
tests_validation:
- Send message → appears for both parties instantly
- Open chat → see all previous messages
- New message from other party → appears in real-time
- Phone button → opens dialer with counterpart number

name: Implement system messages in chat timeline
description: Automatic system messages for every status change, even without user conversation. Timestamps and actor info.
acceptance_criteria:
- System message entries in chat for each status change
- Format: status change description + timestamp + actor
- Visual distinction from user messages
- Hebrew message templates per spec
tests_validation:
- Status changes to 'Pending' → system message in chat
- Status changes to 'Approved' → system message
- Status changes to 'Picked Up' → system message
- Status changes to 'Delivered' → system message

name: Implement chat image upload
description: Image upload in chat from camera or gallery. Compress before upload. Cloud Storage with delivery reference.
acceptance_criteria:
- Camera capture button in chat
- Gallery selection button
- Image compression before upload
- Upload to Cloud Storage
- Image preview in chat bubble
- Upload progress indicator
tests_validation:
- Take photo in chat → uploaded → preview shown
- Select from gallery → same flow
- Large image → compressed before upload
- Both parties see the image

name: Implement proof system (pickup/delivery/payment)
description: Mandatory proof image uploads for status transitions. Proof of Pickup required for 'Picked Up', Proof of Delivery for 'Delivered'. Payment proof optional.
acceptance_criteria:
- Proof upload screen triggered on status action
- Cannot complete Picked Up without proof image
- Cannot complete Delivered without proof image
- Proof of Payment option for sender
- Metadata stored: deliveryId, uploadedBy, proofType, timestamp
- Proof images visible in chat as system entries
- Non-deletable by users
tests_validation:
- Driver marks 'Picked Up' → must upload photo first
- Skip photo → cannot complete status change
- Upload photo → status change completes
- Proof visible to both parties in chat timeline
- Users cannot delete proof images

name: Implement Cloud Functions push notification triggers
description: Server-side push triggers for all 8 notification events from the push matrix. Cloud Functions triggered by Firestore writes.
acceptance_criteria:
- Cloud Function for each event type
- Firestore trigger on delivery status changes
- Firestore trigger on new chat messages
- FCM message construction with title/body/deep link
- Geo-targeted push for new listings (radius query)
- Basic deduplication for same listing
tests_validation:
- Status changes → push sent to correct recipient(s)
- New chat message → push to counterpart
- New listing → push to drivers within radius
- Duplicate notifications prevented for same event

name: Implement FCM client integration
description: Receive and handle push notifications on mobile. Permission request, token management, notification tap handling, deep links.
acceptance_criteria:
- FCM permission request on first launch
- Token stored in user document
- Foreground notification display
- Background notification handling
- Notification tap → deep link to relevant screen
- Badge count management
tests_validation:
- Grant notification permission → token saved
- Receive push while app open → in-app notification shown
- Receive push while app closed → system notification
- Tap notification → opens correct screen (delivery/chat/rating)

name: Implement in-app notification fallback
description: When push notification is not delivered (OS restrictions), update in-app badge/indicator on next app open.
acceptance_criteria:
- Notification state synced from Firestore
- Badge count on tab bar
- Notification indicator on relevant screens
- Updates on app foreground/resume
tests_validation:
- Push blocked by OS → badge still shows on next open
- Clear notification → badge decrements
- All pending notifications visible in-app

name: Build payment confirmation UI
description: Payment section in delivery details. Deep links to Bit/PayBox/bank. Sender marks 'Payment Sent', driver marks 'Payment Received'.
acceptance_criteria:
- Payment status section in delivery details
- Visual badge: Pending → Sent → Confirmed → Completed
- 'Pay via Bit' deep link button
- 'Pay via PayBox' deep link button
- 'Bank Transfer' option
- 'Payment Sent' button for sender
- 'Payment Received' button for driver
tests_validation:
- After 'Delivered' → payment section visible
- Tap 'Pay via Bit' → opens Bit app
- Sender marks 'Payment Sent' → status updates
- Driver marks 'Payment Received' → status updates
- Both confirmed → 'Completed & Paid'

name: Implement payment confirmation backend
description: Cloud Function handling payment confirmations. Triggers Completed & Paid status. Logs in timeline. Push notifications.
acceptance_criteria:
- confirmPayment Cloud Function
- Validates actor (sender sends, driver receives)
- Stores confirmation with timestamp + actor
- When both confirm → auto-transition to 'Completed & Paid'
- System message in chat for each confirmation
- Push notification to counterpart
tests_validation:
- Sender confirms → stored, push sent to driver
- Driver confirms → stored, push sent to sender
- Both confirmed → status changes to 'Completed & Paid'
- Confirmation logged in chat timeline

name: Build admin panel authentication
description: Web-based admin panel with secure login. Only admin role users can access.
acceptance_criteria:
- Web app (React or Next.js)
- Firebase Auth integration
- Admin role check on login
- Redirect non-admin users
- Session management
tests_validation:
- Admin user logs in → dashboard shown
- Non-admin logs in → access denied message
- Session persists across page refresh

name: Build admin dashboard
description: Dashboard showing key metrics: total users, active deliveries, deliveries this week, acceptance rate, active reports.
acceptance_criteria:
- Dashboard with metric cards
- Real-time data from Firestore
- Charts: deliveries/week trend, user growth
- Quick links to management screens
tests_validation:
- Dashboard loads with current metrics
- Numbers match actual Firestore data
- Charts render correctly

name: Build admin user management
description: User listing with search, filter, view profile. Suspend, block, verify, restrict users.
acceptance_criteria:
- User list table with pagination
- Search by name, phone, email
- Filter by role, KYC status, blocked status
- User detail: full profile, rating, deliveries, reports, KYC document
- Actions: suspend, block, unblock, verify, restrict
- All actions logged in audit trail
tests_validation:
- Search user by phone → found
- View user detail → shows all fields + KYC document
- Block user → status changes, audit logged
- Suspended user cannot login

name: Build admin delivery management
description: Delivery listing with search, timeline view. Status override, force cancel, resolve. Proof and payment viewers.
acceptance_criteria:
- Delivery list table with filters (status, date, city)
- Delivery detail: full timeline, status logs, payment logs
- Proof image viewer (pickup/delivery/payment)
- Admin override: change status manually
- Force cancel delivery
- Mark as resolved
- All overrides logged in audit trail
tests_validation:
- View delivery timeline → all status changes shown
- View proof images → images display correctly
- Override status → changes, audit logged
- Force cancel → delivery cancelled, notifications sent

name: Build admin report & moderation tools
description: Report management: view user reports, add admin notes, track moderation history. Rating/comment moderation.
acceptance_criteria:
- Report list with filters (type, status, date)
- 5+ predefined report types
- Admin notes per user/delivery
- Remove abusive ratings/comments
- Moderation action history (audit trail)
- Report status: new, investigating, resolved
tests_validation:
- View reports → list with correct types
- Add admin note → saved and visible
- Remove abusive comment → hidden from users
- All moderation actions in audit trail

name: Build rating prompt and submission UI
description: After delivery reaches 'Delivered', prompt both parties to rate. In-app screen + triggered by push notification.
acceptance_criteria:
- Rating screen: 1-5 star selector + optional comment (300 chars)
- Triggered after 'Delivered' status
- Push notification: 'Please rate your delivery'
- Can rate later from My Deliveries / My Trips
- One-time submission (cannot edit after)
tests_validation:
- Delivery completed → rating prompt appears
- Select stars + add comment → submit → saved
- Try to rate again → 'Already rated' message
- Skip → can rate later from personal screen

name: Implement rating backend and display
description: Cloud Function for rating storage. Calculate user average. Display ratings on profiles and listings.
acceptance_criteria:
- createRating Cloud Function with validation
- One rating per user per delivery enforced
- User aggregate: average stars + total count updated on write
- Rating display on user profile
- Rating display on listing/delivery details
tests_validation:
- Submit rating → stored in ratings collection
- Try duplicate → rejected
- User profile → shows updated average
- Listing shows counterpart rating

name: Implement cancellation logic (complete)
description: Full cancellation flow with all edge cases. Status revert, feed restoration, notifications, timeline logging.
acceptance_criteria:
- Cancel button for both sender and driver (pre-pickup only)
- Status reverts to 'New Delivery' (unless sender deletes)
- Listing returns to driver feed
- Push notification to counterpart
- System message in chat: who cancelled + when
- Cancel blocked after 'Picked Up'
tests_validation:
- Cancel during 'Pending' → reverts to 'New', back in feed
- Cancel during 'Waiting for Pickup' → same behavior
- Attempt cancel after 'Picked Up' → blocked
- Counterpart receives push + chat message

name: Build interstitial ad infrastructure
description: Configurable launch screen supporting image/video content. Server-side targeting. Admin toggle. Disabled for launch.
acceptance_criteria:
- Interstitial screen component
- Image/video display support
- Configurable duration + skip button
- Click-through link (external/in-app)
- Server-side targeting rules (role, user flag, group)
- Admin panel activation/deactivation
- Disabled by default in production
tests_validation:
- Enable in admin → interstitial shows on app launch
- Disable → no interstitial
- Skip button works
- Click-through opens correct URL
- Targeting by role works (only drivers see it, etc.)

name: Integrate analytics events

tests_validation:

name: Implement loading states across all screens

tests_validation:

- Publish listing → button disabled during submit
- Status update → button disabled until confirmed

name: Implement empty states across all screens
description: Proper empty state messaging for all list views when no data exists.

- My Trips: 'No active deliveries' + CTA
- My Deliveries: 'No active deliveries' + CTA
- Chat: empty state when no messages

tests_validation:
- New driver with no nearby deliveries → empty state shown
- New sender with no deliveries → empty state + 'Create delivery' CTA
- Empty chat → appropriate message shown

name: Implement offline and error handling
description: Graceful degradation when offline. Error states with retry. No duplicate submissions.
acceptance_criteria:
- Network state detection
- Offline banner/indicator
- Critical actions blocked with clear message when offline
- Error state screens with retry button
- Idempotent request handling (prevent double-tap)
- Retry logic for transient failures
tests_validation:
- Turn off network → offline indicator shown
- Try to publish listing offline → blocked with message
- Status update fails → error + retry button
- Double-tap action button → only one request processed

name: Implement GPS/location permission handling
description: Handle GPS denied, disabled, or unavailable states gracefully across the app.
acceptance_criteria:
- Location permission request with explanation
- GPS denied: manual city selection for driver feed
- Publishing: requires address regardless of GPS (autocomplete)
- Tracking: 'Location unavailable' without blocking other flows
- Re-prompt option in settings
tests_validation:
- Deny GPS → driver feed shows manual city selector
- GPS off during tracking → 'Location unavailable' shown
- Chat and status changes still work without GPS
- Settings shows option to enable location

name: P0/P1 bug triage and fixing sprint
